_provenance: CB-KD-01 v1.1.1 section 10 (Language and claims constraints) plus the replacement-claim ban of section 3. The register is quiet, declarative and free of hype. These terms are banned without exception across every downstream artefact: dossiers, the site, outreach, delivery emails and posts. Matching is case-insensitive, on whole words/phrases (word boundaries), so ordinary words that merely contain a banned substring do not trip.
source: CB-KD-01 Product Specification v1.1.1, sections 3 and 10

banned.reason: guarantee language of any kind is banned (s.10)
